arrows.name: Accurate
arrows.rules: Gain +2 to attack rolls made with this arrow.

arrows.name: Explosive
arrows.rules: On impact, this arrow explodes and deals 2 fire damage to each creature within 5 ft.

arrows.name: Healing
arrows.rules: Allies hit by this arrow heal 1d4 hitpoints instead of taking damage.

arrows.name: Bouncy
arrows.rules: This arrow can bounce off of one surface before it hits its first target.

arrows.name: Immaterial
arrows.rules: You can shoot this arrow through solid objects.

arrows.name: Toppling
arrows.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength save or be knocked Prone.

arrows.name: Splitting
arrows.rules: You can target an additional creature with this attack.

arrows.name: Invisiblerer
arrows.rules: Allies hit by this turn Invisible for 1 minute (ends on attack/spell).

arrows.name: Fire
arrows.rules: The arrow deals an extra 1d8 Fire damage.

arrows.name: Blinding
arrows.rules: Target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution save or be Blinded until the end of its next turn.

arrows.name: Beau's Finest: Seeker
arrows.rules: This arrow automatically hits any target you have seen in the last minute.

trinkets.name: Compass of Nearness
trinkets.rules: Always points to the nearest source of fresh water within 1 mile.

trinkets.name: Warmth Stone
trinkets.rules: A pebble that stays at exactly 100°F (38°C).

trinkets.name: Key of Locks
trinkets.rules: Tells you the name of the person who last locked the door this key is inserted into.

trinkets.name: Glittering Sandglass
trinkets.rules: A 1-minute timer that dings only in your mind when finished.
